Student Achievements

“The Truth Seekers” Student Game Project Receives YEP InIDEA Support

Developed by Kadir Has University students as part of the NMD221 – Game Design Principles course conducted by Dr. Onur Sesigür during the Fall semester of 2024–2025, the digital game project titled The Truth Seekers has been awarded financial support of 45,000 TL under the YEP InIDEA program. The Truth Seekers stands out as a strong example that reflects students’ innovative and creative approaches in the field of interactive storytelling and game design.

Elif İBİŞ / New Media

Won an award by successfully completing the project briefing with her team as part of the “Hayata Varım” Project.

Currently participating in the “Yıldız Kadınlar” Mentorship Program.
